global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple background with a central focus on promotional card slots and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a 2-for-1 offer on food with a call to action to book now.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the background, creating a vibrant and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Three card slots
elements.description: Three rectangular card slots are displayed in the center, each with a glossy finish and a slight reflection.

elements.label: Fresh favorites nearby
elements.description: A bold, white text line that reads 'Fresh favorites nearby' is centered below the main subject, conveying a sense of immediacy.

elements.label: 2-for-1 tonight
elements.description: A prominent white text line stating '2-for-1 tonight' is positioned above the main subject, emphasizing the offer.

elements.label: BiteRush logo
elements.description: The logo 'BiteRush' is displayed at the top in bold, modern typography, colored in white against the purple background.

elements.label: Book now button
elements.description: A bright yellow button with the text 'Book now' is located at the bottom, designed to stand out and encourage action.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small, circular badge in yellow with the word 'SALE' in bold black text, positioned at the top right corner.

elements.label: Card slot reflections
elements.description: Subtle reflections are visible on the card slots, adding depth and a polished look to the design.

elements.label: BiteRush headline
elements.description: The word 'BiteRush' is prominently displayed at the top in a large, bold font, establishing brand identity.

elements.label: Book now text
elements.description: The text 'Book now' is clearly visible on the yellow button, inviting users to take immediate action.

elements.label: SALE text
elements.description: The word 'SALE' is displayed in bold black text on a yellow circular badge, drawing attention to the promotion.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bright and modern, 2-for-1 offer, BiteRush logo
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the main subject is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: 2-for-1 tonight, Fresh favorites nearby, BiteRush, Book now, SALE
